alpha.desc: Northern approach view depicting the relationship between the primary structure, adjacent commercial development, parking areas, and surrounding transportation corridors|Vehicle access routes, pedestrian circulation patterns, and neighboring occupancies are visible within the surrounding urban environment.

bravo.desc: Western approach view illustrating building placement, property boundaries, parking configuration, and access routes from the surrounding street network|Nearby commercial properties and supporting infrastructure are visible within the immediate area.

charlie.desc: Southern approach view showing the rear and side operational areas of the property, including potential service zones, utility locations, delivery access routes, and adjacent development|Site circulation and secondary access opportunities may be observed from this perspective.

delta.desc: Eastern approach view highlighting the property's street-facing characteristics, customer access points, visibility from public roadways, and relationship to neighboring businesses|Pedestrian activity areas and primary ingress routes are evident from this orientation.

nadir.desc: Commercial brewery, restaurant, and hospitality property situated on a developed urban parcel within Bend's Galveston Corridor|The site contains a primary commercial structure with associated parking, pedestrian access areas, outdoor gathering spaces, and service access points|Adjacent properties consist of mixed commercial and residential development with direct frontage on NW Galveston Avenue.
